## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change with no behavior change
- [ ] `style` — Styling / UI only
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, dependencies, config
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only

## Related issue / task

<!-- Link to GitHub issue or task if applicable. e.g. Closes #42 -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? What scenarios did you verify? -->

- [ ] Tested locally on desktop
- [ ] Tested locally on mobile viewport
- [ ] No regressions on affected pages

## PR Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on `main` (up to date with `origin/main`)
- [ ] No `.env`, `appsettings.json`, `appsettings.Development.json`, or `appsettings.Production.json` committed
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or secrets in the diff
- [ ] All new UI uses Tailwind CSS (no new `.css` files)
- [ ] All imports use `@/` alias
- [ ] No new libraries added without prior approval
- [ ] No `console.log` calls left in code
- [ ] Math content uses `$...$` / `$$...$$` LaTeX (MathLive/MathJax compatible)

## Screenshots (if UI change)
